name: S13 ULTIMATE: Tokin Privacy (Security Audit 24/7 + Credential Rotation Reminder)

parameters.command: cat /data/agencia/security/audit_$(date +%Y-%m-%d).json 2>/dev/null || echo '{"error": "No audit file found for today. Run aurenix-security-audit.sh first."}'

parameters.text:
=🛡️ *S13 TOKIN PRIVACY — Security Audit {{ $json.date }}*

*Overall:* {{ $json.severity }} ({{ $json.critCount }} critical, {{ $json.warnCount }} warnings)

{{ $json.findings.map((f, i) => `${f.level === 'CRITICAL' ? '\u274c' : '\u26a0\ufe0f'} *${f.check}:* ${f.details.substring(0, 150)}`).join('\n') }}

*Resources:* Disk {{ $json.diskPercent }}% | RAM {{ $json.ramPercent }}%
*SSH attacks (24h):* {{ $json.sshAttacks }}
*Fail2ban:* {{ $json.fail2ban.ssh_currently_banned || 0 }} currently banned

Full report: `/data/agencia/security/audit_{{ $json.date }}.json`

parameters.fileContent: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: $json.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(), date: $json.date, severity: $json.severity, critCount: $json.critCount, warnCount: $json.warnCount, sshAttacks: $json.sshAttacks, diskPercent: $json.diskPercent, ramPercent: $json.ramPercent }) }}

parameters.command: echo '===WEEKLY_SECURITY_DIGEST==='; echo ''; echo '=== Last 7 audit results ==='; for f in $(ls -t /data/agencia/security/audit_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -7); do echo "$(basename $f): $(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$f')); print(d.get('overall','?'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'parse error')"; done; echo ''; echo '=== SSH attacks last 7 days ==='; journalctl -u ssh --since '7 days ago' 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'Failed password\|Failed publickey' || echo '0'; echo ''; echo '=== Fail2ban weekly ==='; fail2ban-client status sshd 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'banned|Total' || echo 'N/A'; echo ''; echo '=== Disk trend ==='; df -h / 2>/dev/null | tail -1; echo ''; echo '=== Docker health ==='; docker ps --format '{{.Names}}: {{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null | head -15

parameters.text:
=📊 *S13 TOKIN PRIVACY — Weekly Security Digest*

```
{{ $json.stdout || 'No data available' }}
```

_Generado {{ new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES') }}_
